## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `go mod tidy`
- [ ] `make verify`
- [ ] `go run honnef.co/go/tools/cmd/staticcheck@latest ./...`
- [ ] Updated docs, if needed
- [ ] Added or updated tests, if needed

## Compatibility

- [ ] No breaking change to `Dockyard.yaml` `dockyard.dev/v1alpha1`
- [ ] Release/lock/provenance format changes are documented, if any

## Security

- [ ] No secrets or generated deploy values committed
- [ ] Path/archive/env/OCI changes include safety checks
